_comments.MAX_THINKING_TOKENS: Caps internal reasoning to 8K tokens. Lower = cheaper, higher = better at complex tasks. See docs/settings-guide.md
_comments.CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE: Auto-compacts context at 50% fullness. Prevents 64K token errors with cheap models. See docs/settings-guide.md
_comments.DISABLE_NON_ESSENTIAL_MODEL_CALLS: Disables background model calls that consume tokens silently. Set to 0 to re-enable.
_comments.permissions: Full access granted. Agents can read, write, and run any command. Review before use on sensitive repos.
